items.headline: France redirected its nuclear aircraft carrier toward Iran. Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei — son of the killed leader — named amid fears of what comes next.

items.author: @NoLimitGains
items.headline: Iran names new Supreme Leader: Mojtaba Khamenei, 56, son of the man killed by US/Israel 9 days ago. Never held office, never given a public speech. Lived in shadows.
